3155870.name: SOF: Enemy from the future - The Mystery of the Missing
3155870.description:
Get ready for new battles and mysteries in the "The Mystery of the Missing" expansion!

In this expansion, you'll face new dangers and uncover secrets. You will explore new territories and combat even more terrifying enemies, unravel the mystery behind the disappearances of people and their connection to the aliens, and finally discover the true nature of the monstrous appearances.
3155870.supported_languages:
英语, 德语, 俄语*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
